L9 Golden Microservice Repo

Purpose: reusable microservice runtime and deploy template.

Canonical contract:
- PacketEnvelope v1.1
- HTTP POST /v1/execute

Not this repo:
- Gate node business orchestration
- service-specific domain handlers

This repo owns:
- transport core
- ingress adapter
- startup/preflight
- deployment kit
- clients
- templates
- operational docs
